26 Man Tax: Jose Condessa
'No loss should be more regrettable to us than losing our time, for it is irretrievable.' - Zeno of Citium So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

item.title: Play stupid games, win stupid prizes
item.description: Small cafe, between the two of us we account for about 1/3rd of their weekly labor hours. The owner is a manipulative gaslighter, the store manager is an abusive piece of crap, and together they make an awful pair of people to work for. Spouse and I were sitting around our kitchen table yesterday in a rare shared day off, commiserating about how badly we did not want to go to work on Mother's Day, and talking turned into looking at our finances and estimating how soon one or the other of us would need to be able to find a new job. We realized that we had a lot more breathing room than we thought, drafted resignation letters (with swears, and everything), and sent them in today a few minutes before our shifts. Feels like a huge weight has been lifted. What a fucking high.
item.dc:creator: Blud4BludGod

item.title: GovBrief Today #465
item.description: Some drivers in downtown Chicago paid $5.78 a gallon for regular today. That price is the cost of 72 days of war Trump initially told the New York Times would take "four to five weeks." The 60-day War Powers Resolution clock expired May 1, and Hegseth told Congress the ceasefire pauses it, even though drones hit four countries this weekend. The Energy Secretary's response to a 50% gas price jump was to float a suspension of the 18-cent federal gas tax. Eighteen cents will not touch what 72 days of war is doing to Americans at the pump. Trump's Republican enablers in the Senate keep voting down war powers resolutions, but the votes are getting closer. The last one failed by only three. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to push your senators to vote yes on the next one. I've emailed 7,337 stories over 465 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss easy-click links, more context, data, and pictures on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260510-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may10 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/moms-gov-web [3] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-election-army [4] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-kelly [5] https://go.govbrief.today/fed-gas-tax [6] https://go.govbrief.today/buy-american Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1683 (recreational plutonium)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. (Iranian flatbread)
This is a label I made for a Blood Orange and Sage mead.
Someone has been posting on this subreddit birding memes from China, and they are amazing.
Eurasian Blackbirds, like crows, can recognize specific people.
It's interesting to re-read books that I read when I was a teen or in my 20s.
Wood thrushes definitely have a bit of a pompous air to them.
They get angry eyebrows in spring and they look hilariously cute and angry.
Art by Natee Himmapan
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Peekaboo Peekaboo peekaboo peekaboo glory Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
